query:
-- Converter formato MMAA (3 dígitos: 1 mês + 2 ano) para MM/AAAA
-- Ex: "126" -> "01/2026", "226" -> "02/2026", "526" -> "05/2026"
UPDATE consignados
SET mes = CONCAT(LPAD(SUBSTRING(mes, 1, LENGTH(mes)-2), 2, '0'), '/20', SUBSTRING(mes, LENGTH(mes)-1))
WHERE mes REGEXP '^[0-9]{3,4}$' AND mes NOT LIKE '%/%';

-- Ex: "126" -> "01/2026", "226" -> "02/2026", "526" -> "05/2026"
UPDATE consignados
